rootCause: ensurePlaywrightBrowsers installed Chromium binaries but never triggered playwright install-deps, leaving system libraries like libatk1.0-0t64 missing. Chromium crashed on launch and every e2e test failed.
resolution: Teach ensurePlaywrightBrowsers to run playwright install-deps on Linux (with a sentinel file) before downloading browsers, and cover the behavior with vitest mocks.
